name: Real-world minimum server specs for OpenWebUI
snippet: 29 Jan 2025 — OpenWebUI on Cloudron out of the box is running with CPU+RAM only (not GPU+VRAM). Even for tiny models, that's going to be very slow even with very fast CPUs.

name: Minimum system requirements · open-webui open-webui  - GitHub
snippet: For optimal performance with ollama and open-webui, consider a system with an Intel/AMD CPU supporting AVX512 or DDR5 for speed and efficiency in computation, at least 16GB of RAM, and around 50GB of available disk space.
